name: submit_feedback
description: Submit feedback (upvote, downvote, or pin) on a search result chunk to improve future search relevance. The feedback trains the personalization system so similar content ranks higher/lower in future searches.

chunk_id.description: The chunk ID to give feedback on.

kind.description: Type of feedback: 'upvote' boosts future ranking, 'downvote' lowers it, 'pin' strongly boosts it.

query.description: The search query context for this feedback. Helps the system learn which results are relevant for specific queries.
